payload.title: NEW YORK CITY TRANSIT KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: Transformation of NYCT's entire 5,800 bus fleet to Zero-Emission technology by 2040
Eight-week proof of concept with Convo to connect ASL customers to live interpreters via QR codes at Customer Service Centers
On-demand trip solution pilot for paratransit customers, next phase launch
Pilot program deploying electric vehicles for Access-A-Ride Paratransit service
Deployment of 60 battery-electric buses by end of 2024, serving routes out of Grand Avenue, East New York, Michael J. Quill, and Charleston depots

tool_args.label: On-Street Pantograph Charger at Williamsburg Bridge Plaza

payload.project_name: On-Street Pantograph Charger at Williamsburg Bridge Plaza
payload.description: On-street pantograph charger for buses to 'top-off' batteries between daily runs, expected operation July 2024

tool_args.label: First Zero-Emission 40-foot Buses Unveiled
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Chair & CEO Janno Lieber is joined by Rep. Nydia Velázquez, NYPA President & CEO Justin Driscoll, Queens Borough President Donovan Richards, and NYCT President Richard Davey at the Grand Avenue Depot, on Tuesday, May 14, to announce an additional 60 all-electric buses joining NYCT's current fleet.

payload.description: First-ever Zero-Emission 40-foot buses in NYCT history unveiled. Two battery-electric buses entered service for customers in Queens and Brooklyn out of the Grand Avenue Depot.

tool_args.label: Convo ASL Proof of Concept Launch
tool_args.raw_text: Starting today, May 20, customers can test out Convo at the Customer Service Centers at Times Square and Penn Station!

payload.event_name: Convo ASL Proof of Concept Launch
payload.description: Eight-week proof of concept with Convo begins at Customer Service Centers at Times Square and Penn Station, connecting ASL customers to live interpreters via QR codes.

tool_args.label: First EV for AAR Debuted
tool_args.raw_text: On April 15, we debuted the first of fifteen electric vehicles (EV) to the public.

payload.event_name: First of fifteen electric vehicles debuted for Access-A-Ride
payload.description: Debuted the first of fifteen electric vehicles (EV) to the public for Access-A-Ride Paratransit service pilot program.

tool_args.label: On-Street Pantograph Charger Expected Operational
tool_args.raw_text: an on-street pantograph charger for buses to "top-off" their batteries in between daily runs is expected to be in operation in July 2024 at the Williamsburg Bridge Plaza in Brooklyn.

payload.event_name: On-Street Pantograph Charger at Williamsburg Bridge Plaza operational
payload.description: On-street pantograph charger for buses to top-off batteries between daily runs expected to be in operation at Williamsburg Bridge Plaza in Brooklyn.

tool_args.label: Subway ridership 3-5% gain vs prior year
tool_args.raw_text: Compared to this time last year, we've seen a 3-5% gain in average daily ridership, especially on Tuesdays through Thursdays

payload.raw_value_text: 3-5% gain in average daily ridership
payload.comparison_period: April and May compared to same time last year
payload.description: Subway ridership gain compared to same time last year

tool_args.label: Subway ridership now frequently exceeds 4 million daily
tool_args.raw_text: four million daily riders – a number that once seemed like a stretch goal – is the new normal on Tuesdays, Wednesday, and Thursdays

payload.raw_value_text: four million daily riders
payload.description: Subway ridership now frequently exceeds 4 million daily riders on Tuesdays, Wednesdays, and Thursdays

payload.raw_value_text: Subway ridership now frequently exceeds 70% of pre-pandemic levels
payload.description: Subway ridership exceeds 70% of pre-pandemic levels

payload.raw_value_text: customer journey time improved by over 2 percentage points to 74%
payload.description: Bus customer journey time performance

payload.raw_value_text: Total ridership in April 2024 was 20% higher than the prior year
payload.description: Total paratransit ridership increase year over year

payload.raw_value_text: broker service On-Time Performance up 7% compared to April 2023, with 93% of trips completed within the pickup window
payload.description: Paratransit broker on-time performance

payload.raw_value_text: broker service On-Time Performance up 7% compared to April 2023
payload.description: Paratransit broker on-time performance improvement year over year

payload.raw_value_text: Service Delivered, at 96.4%
payload.description: Share of scheduled buses actually provided at the peak load point during peak hours

payload.raw_value_text: Bus speeds were at 8.1 mph
payload.description: Average speed of all NYCT and MTA buses

payload.raw_value_text: Total ridership in April 2024 increased by nearly 20%, or an average of more than 5,000 trips per day, compared to April 2023
payload.description: Total paratransit ridership year-over-year increase

payload.raw_value_text: the no-show rate decreased by 0.1 per 1,000 scheduled trips to 0.90
payload.description: Primary carrier paratransit no-show rate

payload.raw_value_text: For Broker service, the result for April 2024 was 0.90 no-shows per 1,000 scheduled trips
payload.description: Broker service paratransit no-show rate

payload.raw_value_text: In April 2024, 98% of all calls were answered
payload.description: Paratransit call answer rate

payload.raw_value_text: weekday On Time Performance (OTP) was 81.2%
payload.description: Subway weekday on-time performance

payload.raw_value_text: the percentage of customers arriving at their destinations within five minutes of schedule (CJTP) rose to 84.8%
payload.description: Subway customer journey time performance

payload.raw_value_text: Paid weekday subway ridership averaged 3.69 million
payload.description: Average paid weekday subway ridership

payload.raw_value_text: April paid weekday bus ridership also dipped relative to March, from 1.29 million to 1.24 million
payload.description: Average paid weekday bus ridership

payload.raw_value_text: Initial estimates for total ridership, including fare evasion, legal non-paying riders, and the ridership on the five pilot Fare Free routes, come to about 2.61 million on weekdays
payload.description: Estimated total weekday bus ridership including fare evasion, legal non-paying riders, and Fare Free routes

tool_args.label: Major felony crime down 19% month-over-month April 2024

payload.raw_value_text: In April 2024, Major Felony Crime was down 19% month over month (versus March 2024)
payload.description: Major felony crime month-over-month decrease

tool_args.label: Major felony crime down 23% year-over-year April 2024

payload.raw_value_text: down 23% from the comparative month a year prior (April 2023)
payload.description: Major felony crime year-over-year decrease

payload.raw_value_text: Annual growth versus April 2023 stands at 0.9%
payload.description: Paid weekday subway ridership annual growth

tool_args.label: OMNY market share grew 9% over 12 months

payload.raw_value_text: Over the last 12 months, OMNY market share has grown by 9%
payload.description: OMNY market share growth over 12 months

warnings: metric_claim.source_system is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. 26 accepted/canonical observations name systems/programs such as ABLE or camera programs. Suggested relation: entity/project has_metric metric_claim when the endpoint resolves exactly.

tool_args.label: OMNY 76% of regular fare pay-as-you-go customers

payload.raw_value_text: Of regular fare customers who pay as they ride, 76% are now using OMNY
payload.description: OMNY market share among regular fare pay-as-you-go subway customers

warnings: metric_claim.source_system is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. 26 accepted/canonical observations name systems/programs such as ABLE or camera programs. Suggested relation: entity/project has_metric metric_claim when the endpoint resolves exactly.

tool_args.label: Autonomous Pantograph Dispensers at Grand Avenue Depot

payload.description: First 17 of 51 autonomous pantograph dispensers operational at Grand Avenue Bus Depot

tool_args.label: Pantograph Dispensers East New York, Herkimer, Charleston

payload.description: Additional pantograph dispensers expected to come online by year's end at East New York Depot, Herkimer location in Brooklyn, and Charleston Depot in Staten Island

payload.claim_text: By 2040, our entire 5,800 bus fleet will be powered by Zero-Emission technology
payload.subject: NYCT bus fleet
payload.description: Target for full fleet zero-emission conversion

payload.claim_text: On buses, we've changed the way we deploy our EAGLE teams to a 'Bus Hub' approach, where fares are enforced on local and select bus services
payload.subject: MTA EAGLE teams
payload.description: Deployment change to Bus Hub approach for fare enforcement

payload.claim_text: Year-to-date we completed 1,421 turnstile modifications, which is 37.6% of the total turnstiles to be completed, keeping us on track to reach 60% of the system by the end of the year
payload.subject: MTA turnstile modifications
payload.description: Turnstile modification progress for fare compliance

tool_args.label: April fare evasion data not yet available

payload.gap_text: April fare evasion data not yet available

tool_args.label: Customer accident rate April data unavailable
Employee lost time accident rate April data unavailable

April 2024 assaults and harassments against NYCT employees data
